testcase.name: server integration — in-process server with fake engine > GET /health returns 200 with runner identity
server integration — in-process server with fake engine > POST /run with no token returns 200 (default-off gate)
server integration — in-process server with fake engine > POST /run returns 401 when AGENTA_RUNNER_TOKEN is set and no bearer supplied
server integration — in-process server with fake engine > POST /run accepts the correct bearer token
server integration — in-process server with fake engine > POST /run returns NDJSON stream with event lines then a result line
session record persist — skipped when Redis unavailable > alive watchdog start+release does not throw (in-process, no Redis)
session record persist — skipped when Redis unavailable > buildPersistingEmitter flush is a no-op when no events emitted
session record persist — skipped when Redis unavailable > Redis-dependent session coordination is skipped when Redis is unavailable
testcase.system-out: [skip] Redis not available — skipping Redis integration assertions
